export class JukeboxToastParser{constructor(){this._data={kind:'info',text:''};}flush(){this._data={kind:'info',text:''};return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;/**
         * MUST match server JukeboxToastComposer order:
         * kind:string // "info" | "success" | "error" | "warning"
         * text:string
         */const kind=wrapper.readString();const text=wrapper.readString();this._data={kind,text};return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
